etymology.description: зөІ(зөІ) (sД«, "silk; thread") + иЁҖ(иЁҖ) (yГЎn, "speech") = speech that is intricately woven or intently entangled
etymology.interpretation: The character дңҢ combines the elements of speech and thread, suggesting the notion of speech that is intricately woven or entangled, indicating complex or detailed spoken matters.
